article_meta.title: Former President Donald Trump speaks at a campaign rally on April 27, 2023, in Manchester, New Hampshire

reasoning: The summary maintains neutral language, attributes claims properly, and avoids adopting CNN’s opinion framing. It reports Trump’s allegations and the lack of corroborating evidence with cautious wording and balanced sourcing.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs (claimed, alleged, reported) and avoids charged phrasing.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All assertions about evidence are tied to CNN’s inquiries and cited expert/org responses.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments are presented as fact; uncertainty is explicitly noted.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No alarmist or emotive language; tone is factual.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or character judgments.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No attributions of intent or mental states beyond direct claims.
custom_reasoning.slant: Reflects both anti- and pro-immigration organizations and CNN’s searches proportionally.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Slight omission of some specific sources mentioned (e.g., pro-Trump super PAC, FactCheck.org by name).
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Avoids evaluative adjectives; sticks to descriptive terms.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Focus on lack of evidence mirrors the article’s scope without exaggeration.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Treats all source types (campaign, NGOs, media) evenly.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than the source’s opinion framing and avoids editorial cues.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Covers main perspectives but compresses some distinct sources into broader categories.
